title: Research Cross-Journal Editorial Team
gist: An editorial-staff biography page for Springer Nature's Research Cross-Journal Editorial Team, which handles primary research manuscripts across Nature-branded journals; contains no research findings or investor-relevant signal (organizational boilerplate).

insights.claim: Springer Nature operates a Research Cross-Journal Editorial Team, established and led since January 2024 by Prateek Dongare, that works flexibly across Nature and Nature Research Journals handling primary research manuscripts and cross-journal editorial strategy.
insights.speaker: Nature Biotechnology
insights.so_what: Background only on how Springer Nature staffs editorial operations; no tradeable or research signal.
